caseResults.question: What was total revenue last month?
caseResults.compiledSql:
SELECT SUM((oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) - oi.discount_amount) AS metric
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status = 'Completed' AND o.order_date >= @rangeStartUtc AND o.order_date < @rangeEndExclusiveUtc

executionMetadata.compiledSql:

caseResults.question: How many completed orders did we have in the last 30 days?

FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status = 'Completed' AND o.order_date >= @rangeStartUtc AND o.order_date < @rangeEndExclusiveUtc

caseResults.question: Show revenue by product category for the last 90 days.
caseResults.compiledSql:
SELECT p.category AS dimension, SUM((oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) - oi.discount_amount) AS metric
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id
WHERE o.status = 'Completed' AND o.order_date >= @rangeStartUtc AND o.order_date < @rangeEndExclusiveUtc
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY metric DESC, dimension ASC
LIMIT 200

executionMetadata.compiledSql:
SELECT p.category AS dimension, SUM((oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) - oi.discount_amount) AS metric
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id
WHERE o.status = 'Completed' AND o.order_date >= @rangeStartUtc AND o.order_date < @rangeEndExclusiveUtc
GROUP BY p.category

caseResults.question: Break down order count by shipping region for the last quarter.

GROUP BY o.shipping_region

caseResults.question: Units sold by customer segment this year.

JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
JOIN customers c ON c.id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.status = 'Completed' AND o.order_date >= @rangeStartUtc AND o.order_date < @rangeEndExclusiveUtc
GROUP BY c.segment
ORDER BY metric DESC, dimension ASC
LIMIT 200

caseResults.question: Top 3 customer segments by average order value this year.

FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
JOIN customers c ON c.id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.status = 'Completed' AND o.order_date >= @rangeStartUtc AND o.order_date < @rangeEndExclusiveUtc
GROUP BY c.segment

LIMIT 3
